cover.subtitle:
임시정부와 신탁통치,
좌우가 갈라선 12월.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: three formally-dressed diplomat silhouettes (US, UK, Soviet) seated at a long round conference table, viewed from the side. On the table: an open document folder with abstract paper sheets (no readable text). Background: dark blue-gray wall with a stylized world map silhouette. Two small Korean civilian groups stand on opposite sides outside, one holding a red banner, one holding a blue banner. Color: gray suits + red and blue banner accents. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"임정 → 공위 → 신탁"
결정 순서를 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 결정 사항의 순서, 좌익 찬탁 전환 시점(1946.1.3), 미소공위 결렬 원인(반탁 단체 배제 여부), 유엔 이관 흐름이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small round conference table silhouette with three tiny chairs. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
